'''fakuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oesophagogram|oesophagogram]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oesophagogram|oesophagogram]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fakuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fækichith|fækichith]] || [[word:fækichij|fækichij]] || [[word:fækichish|fækichish]] || [[word:fækichi|fækichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fakukuchuth|fakukuchuth]] || [[word:fakukuchuj|fakukuchuj]] || [[word:fakukuchush|fakukuchush]] || [[word:fakukuchu|fakukuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fakuchuth|fakuchuth]] || [[word:fakuchuj|fakuchuj]] || [[word:fakuchush|fakuchush]] || [[word:fakuchu|fakuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fakufchuth|fakufchuth]] || [[word:fakufchuj|fakufchuj]] || [[word:fakufchush|fakufchush]] || [[word:fakufchuf|fakufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fakuchuthu|fakuchuthu]] || [[word:fakuchuju|fakuchuju]] || [[word:fakuchushu|fakuchushu]] || [[word:fakuchuku|fakuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fakuchuth|fakuchuth]] || [[word:fakuchuj|fakuchuj]] || [[word:fakuchush|fakuchush]] || [[word:fakuchu|fakuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fakuchuthul|fakuchuthul]] || [[word:fakuchujul|fakuchujul]] || [[word:fakuchushul|fakuchushul]] || [[word:fakuchukul|fakuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fakuchuthuthu|fakuchuthuthu]] || [[word:fakuchujuju|fakuchujuju]] || [[word:fakuchushushu|fakuchushushu]] || [[word:fakuchuku|fakuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fakuchuthun|fakuchuthun]] || [[word:fakuchujun|fakuchujun]] || [[word:fakuchushun|fakuchushun]] || [[word:fakuchukun|fakuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fakuchuthuoro|fakuchuthuoro]] || [[word:fakuchujuoro|fakuchujuoro]] || [[word:fakuchushuoro|fakuchushuoro]] || [[word:fakuchukuoro|fakuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
